calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the petition for Final Distribution is set for hearing and there should have been an appearance, and stated that the estate is now in a position to close. The Court granted the petition for final distribution (subject to review of the order) not withstanding failure to appear.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Continued To Apr-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Agustin Pina for Jackson Wong and Shelly Wong (Co-Administrators).

The Court informed Counsel that there is no proof of service of the amended petition. Mr. Pina stated that Mr. Chevalier mistakenly submitted it by mail, that it was submitted to a courier last night and that it should be filed today. The First Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to March 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that the other issues to be addressed are what happened to the $280,000.00 in cash and what authority they had to get rid of the cars.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Augustine Pina for Jackson Wong and Shelly Wong (Co-Administrators).

Mr. Pina stated that Mr. Chevalier submitted documents addressing the Examiner's notes for e-filing on Monday, that there was an e-mail error on his end and that the documents should be submitted as of last night or today. The First Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to February 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Continued To Jan-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Continued To Dec-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Continued To Dec-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Quinn Chavalier appeared by telephone for Co-Petitioners.

The Court noted that finally an amended petition has been filed. Mr. Chavalier agreed and stated that it was filed with waivers of the notice of hearing. The Final Account and Report of Petitioners is continued to December 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Quinn Chevalier appeared by telephone for Jackson Wong and Shelly Wong.

The Court stated that it is still waiting for an amended petition. Mr. Chevalier stated that they had PDF copies, that they were imaged poorly and that they were too dark to be legible. Mr. Chevalier also stated that the originals were in the Client's possession, that the Client did not have them, that they needed original signatures, that he has new signature pages and a waiver from the Mother, and that he will certainly file the documents today. The Final Account and Report of Petitioners, etc. is continued to November 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court is holding Counsel to getting this done.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-03-2017 Continued To Oct-17-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Quinn Chevalier appeared by telephone for Jackson Wong and Shelly Wong.

Mr. Chevalier stated that the amended petition is with the administrative staff and is to be filed today, and that it will include responses to the past Examiner's notes. The Final Account and Report of Petitioners, etc. is continued to October 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-22-2017 Continued To Oct-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Quin Chevalier for Co-Administrators.

Mr. Chevalier stated that the amended petition has not been filed, that he does not have it yet, that he has a logistical problem with getting the Co-Administrators' signatures and that he also needs a signature from the Probate Referee. The Final Account and Report of Petitioners, etc. is continued to October 3, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Continued To Aug-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Continued To Mar-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Quinn Chavalier appeared by telephone for the Co-Administrators.

Mr. Chavalier stated that it had been difficult to get both of the Administrators' signatures, that he got the second one as of Monday, that the inventory and appraisal was filed yesterday, and that he is in the process of getting the final numbers and getting the petition for final distribution signed as well. Status on close of the estate is continued to March 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Mr. Chavalier that if it is done by then, he will need to file a petition for approval of status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
